title: Track TODO and FIXME comments that do not contain a reference to a person
description: Ensure that TODO and FIXME comments have a reference to a person, to facilitate tracking and understanding.
message: TODO or FIXME comment does not contain a reference to a person
recommendation: Assign the TODO or FIXME comment to a person, and update it when the task is completed.

noncompliant.description: TODO comment does not contain a reference to a person

compliant.description: TODO comment contains a reference to a person

why_is_this_an_issue: TODO and FIXME comments are useful for tracking tasks and understanding code, but they must have a reference to a person to facilitate communication and accountability.
how_to_fix: Assign the TODO or FIXME comment to a person and update it when the task is completed.

metadata.title: Track TODO and FIXME comments that do not contain a reference to a person
